provisions.title: Citation and comencement
provisions.content: These Regulations may be cited as the Mafia Island (Marine Park Villages) Regulations, 2006 and shall to have come into operation on the date of publication.

provisions.title: Interpretation
provisions.content: In these Regulations unless the context otherwise requires— “ Act ” means the Marine Parks and Reserves Act ; “ marine park village ” means any village or sub-village which significantly affects, or is significantly affected by the Mafia Island Marine Park, in its acronym MIMP;

provisions.title: MIMP villages
provisions.content: (1) All villages on Mafia Island listed in the Schedule shall, from the date of coming into operation of these Regulations, be deemed to be marine park villages for the purpose of these Regulations. (2) A marine park village may include one or more sub-villages of another village. (3) The Minister shall, after consultation with the Board, determine the criteria for the inclusion of a part or parts of a village into a marine part village.

provisions.title: Declaration of a marine park
provisions.content: The Minister may, by order published in the Gazette , declare any inhabited area within MIMP to be a marine park village for the purposes of these Regulations; and may amend the total number or the extent of villages listed in the Schedule, subject to the provisions of regulation 4 .

provisions.title: Maps and sketches to be kept
provisions.content: Clear and easily recognizable boundaries for the villages within the to be kept MIMP shall be placed and maintaned and appropriate maps or sketches indicating such boundaries shall be kept by the Warden.

provisions.title: Penalty
provisions.content: Any person who damages, defaces, alters, shifts, removes or in anyway whatsoever, interferes with any beacons, marks, fence or notice board indicating the boundaries of a village in the MIMP, commits an offence and shall, on conviction, be liable to a fine of one hundred thousand shillings or imprisonment for a term of six months or to both.

provisions.title: Consultation with village councils
provisions.content: Adequate consultations with the village councils affected, relevant village public authorities and any other stakeholders, shall be made by the councils Warden or other MIMP authorities in the exercise of their functions under sub regulation (3) of regulation 3 and the provisions of section 8 of the Act . Schedule (Made unde Regulation 3 and 4) Marine parks villages — Mafia Island Marine Park Villages 1. Chole. 2. Juani. 3. Jibondo 4. Kungwi 5. Bwejuu (sub-village of Kilindoni) 6. Baleni 7. Marinibani 8. Kiegeani 9. Chemchem 10. Miburani 11.
